commands.review_summary:
This PR records device-token-auth metadata for exec approvals, permits trusted backend gateway-client replays for no-device Control UI/WebChat approvals, requests approval scopes for approved node invokes, and adds regression coverage plus a changelog entry.

Reproducibility: yes. source inspection and the linked report give a high-confidence path: a no-device Control UI approval record is bound to the original connId, then the approved node invoke replays through a fresh backend gateway-client connection and current main can reject it with `APPROVAL_CLIENT_MISMATCH`. I did not run the Docker/node scenario live in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: The PR has a protected `maintainer` label and lacks required real behavior proof, so the next action is human maintainer/security review plus contributor proof rather than an automated repair branch.
